.clickable-icon.background: rgb(212, 208, 200) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.clickable-icon.box-shadow: rgb(0, 0, 0) -1px -1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(255, 255, 255) 1px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(128, 128, 128) -2px -2px 0px 0px inset, rgb(223, 223, 223) 2px 2px 0px 0px inset

.clickable-icon.graph-controls-button.background: rgb(212, 208, 200) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.clickable-icon.graph-controls-button.box-shadow: rgb(0, 0, 0) -1px -1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(255, 255, 255) 1px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(128, 128, 128) -2px -2px 0px 0px inset, rgb(223, 223, 223) 2px 2px 0px 0px inset

.nav-file-title-content::after.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-file-title-content::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-files-container.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.nav-files-container.box-shadow: rgb(255, 255, 255) -1px -1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(128, 128, 128) 1px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(212, 208, 200) -2px -2px 0px 0px inset, rgb(64, 64, 64) 2px 2px 0px 0px inset

.nav-header.background: rgb(212, 208, 200) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.nav-header.box-shadow: rgb(64, 64, 64) -1px -1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(223, 223, 223) 1px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(128, 128, 128) -2px -2px 0px 0px inset, rgb(255, 255, 255) 2px 2px 0px 0px inset

.status-bar.background: rgb(212, 208, 200) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.box-shadow: rgb(255, 255, 255) -1px -1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(128, 128, 128) 1px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(212, 208, 200) -2px -2px 0px 0px inset, rgb(64, 64, 64) 2px 2px 0px 0px inset

div.is-clickable.mod-collapsible.nav-fol.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(10, 36, 106) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(10, 36, 106) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.background: rgb(212, 208, 200) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(212, 208, 200) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

html.background: rgb(212, 208, 200) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
html.box-shadow: rgb(64, 64, 64) -1px -1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(255, 255, 255) 1px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(212, 208, 200) -2px -2px 0px 0px inset, rgb(255, 255, 255) 2px 2px 0px 0px inset

html::after.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13)'/></svg>")
html::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) url("data:image/gifbase64,R0lGODlhDAAMAJEAAAAAAP///5mZmf///yH5BAEAAAMALAAAAAAMAAwAAAIbnI8TmSF83IMSKvFWw3dnHnFV+GVGhZZXmaoFADs=") repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.prompt-input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
input.prompt-input[type=\"text\"].box-shadow: rgb(255, 255, 255) -1px -1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(128, 128, 128) 1px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(223, 223, 223) -2px -2px 0px 0px inset, rgb(64, 64, 64) 2px 2px 0px 0px inset

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
input[type=\"search\"].box-shadow: rgb(255, 255, 255) -1px -1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(128, 128, 128) 1px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(255, 255, 255) -2px -2px 0px 0px inset, rgb(64, 64, 64) 2px 2px 0px 0px inset

input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
input[type=\"text\"].box-shadow: rgb(255, 255, 255) -1px -1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(128, 128, 128) 1px 1px 0px 0px inset, rgb(223, 223, 223) -2px -2px 0px 0px inset, rgb(64, 64, 64) 2px 2px 0px 0px inset
